notes: Replaces the Gamepad Bluetooth control helper with a BlueZ D-Bus implementation instead of shelling out through bluetoothctl.
Registers a real pairing agent and handles discovery, pairing, trust, connect, and service-ready state through BlueZ events.
Adds the Python D-Bus runtime packages needed by fresh images and updater installs.
Extends app-side Gamepad pair/connect timeouts to match the cleaner full pairing workflow.
